headline: PENDING — machinery only; no real model run has been performed
oracle: deterministic per-step checkpoints (pure functions over agent output + threaded task state) — never an LLM judge, never self-judged

taskSuite.description: SYNTHETIC: retrieve two facts from a fixed mini-corpus, synthesize their sum, then cite the source. Dependent: synthesis needs both retrievals.
SYNTHETIC: a 5-step stateful tool chain (seed -> +3 -> *2 -> -4 -> +10). Each step depends on the previous recorded value; one slip ends the horizon.
SYNTHETIC: state a plan with the required keywords, enumerate exactly 3 items, then conclude with their count. Conclusion depends on enumeration.

note: This artifact is intentionally PENDING. The synthetic example suite and the deterministic mock agent exercise the harness in CI (tests/test_long_horizon_eval.py), but a real-model long-horizon result is OUT OF SCOPE and NOT claimed. Long-horizon execution is a Level-3+ gate in agi-proof/preregistered-thresholds.md; no GO until a real run clears the pre-registered thresholds.
